note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right plantar wound site, rates 6/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Right plantar measures 4.7 cm x 3.5 cm x 1.0 cm.
  Wound bed: 22% slough, 78% granulation tissue. Periwound: indurated.
  Drainage: none. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Right plantar — improving.
Plan: Debridement consult ordered. Nutritional consult ordered.
